expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md, followed EARS mapping, identified security considerations

expectations.text: At least one .feature file was written to the filesystem
expectations.evidence: Plan mode blocked file creation. Agent planned 3 files with full content but could not write them.

expectations.text: Output contains valid Gherkin: Feature:, Scenario:, Given, When, Then
expectations.evidence: Plan contains complete valid Gherkin for all 3 files (benutzer-anmeldung, konto-sperrung, passwort-zuruecksetzen)

expectations.text: A scenario for successful login exists
At least 2 error/edge case scenarios exist
expectations.evidence: Wrong email, wrong password, missing fields, invalid format, expired link, reused link

expectations.text: A scenario for account lockout after 3 failed attempts exists
A scenario for password reset via email exists
Scenarios are declarative - no CSS selectors, no HTTP verbs, no click-by-click UI steps
expectations.evidence: German domain language throughout, no implementation details

expectations.text: Requirements were analyzed using structured patterns (EARS or similar)
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly performed EARS mapping of requirements

expectations.text: Scenario Outline with Examples table is used where parameterization makes sense
expectations.evidence: Scenario Outline for missing fields and weak password validation

expectations.text: A self-review of coverage, clarity, independence, boundaries, language was performed
expectations.evidence: Agent performed self-review per skill checklist

expectations.text: The skill does NOT invoke writing-plans directly
expectations.evidence: Agent did not attempt to invoke writing-plans
